item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tidak semua situasi memerlukan pembatasan hak individu, dan penindasan bisa terjadi jika sistem kontrolnya lemah.

notes: Agent A remains mildly society-leaning by the end but visibly qualifies the opening stance with rights-protection and control-mechanism concerns. Agent B remains rights-first but moves toward balance by acknowledging social justice and the risk that weak controls can allow rights to be ignored. No complete reversal; both agents converge toward a balanced position. Agent B has a wording artifact, "longlos," but the intended control/safeguard point is still readable.
